name: Old Fashioned Rice Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the milk into a saucepan and place over medium heat.
2. Add the rice to the saucepan with the milk and bring to a simmer.
3. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the rice is tender (about 20-25 minutes).
4. In a separate bowl, beat the egg and sugar together until well combined.
5. Gradually stir in some of the hot rice mixture into the beaten egg mixture to temper it.
6. Whisk in the vanilla and nutmeg.
7. Pour the egg mixture back into the saucepan with the rice, stirring constantly to prevent curdling.
8. Cook for a few more minutes over low heat until thickened, stirring frequently.
9. Turn off the heat and let the pudding cool slightly before serving.
